rulings.Case Title: HUONG (AMY) THAI-SILVA VS. MINH THAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Number 6; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Their Attorney, Tannner, Brink, In The Amount Of $942
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 26, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF HUONG (AMY) THAI-SILVA, VINH THAI, MUOI QUACH Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Number 6; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And Their Attorney, Tannner, Brink, In The Amount Of $942 DENIED. Defendant served a timely code-complaint response to Special Interrogatory 6. Defendant's request for sanctions granted in the amount of $1,000 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. BRIANNA GUERRERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 26, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT AYESHA GAIKWAD MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. Proof of Service on file is executed by the moving defendant "Ayesha Gaikwad" stating under the penalty of perjury that she in "not a party to this action" on October 24, 2018 asserting that she "mailed" the motion on October 25, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DELWIN M. BLACKMAN III VS. TAMARA CARLIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 26, 2018 line 4. PLAINTIFF DELWIN BLACKMAN Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Responses to Discovery to be provided by hand-delivery no later than 5:00 p.m. on November 26, 2018. Request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PING YUEN, L.P. VS. THOMAS P. WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-General; Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer; Sepcial Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; To Deem Matters Specified In Request For Admissions Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Thomas P. Wong And/Or His Attorneys Of Record In The Amount Of $1,252.50; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Julia M. Adams In Support Thereof; And Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 26, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF PING YUEN, L.P. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-General; Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer; Sepcial Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents; To Deem Matters Specified In Request For Admissions Admitted; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Thomas P. Wong And/Or His Attorneys Of Record In The Amount Of $1,252.50 GRANTED, subject to opposition Admissions are deemed admitted. Complete verified responses without objections to other discovery at issue on this motion shall be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $855 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)
